items.definition_en: Frostbite is a condition where skin freezes due to extreme cold.
items.example_en: He had to go to the hospital because of frostbite on his fingers.

items.definition_en: Heatstroke is a serious illness from being in very hot conditions for too long.
items.example_en: Working in the sun for hours can cause heatstroke.

items.definition_en: Wind chill is the way the wind makes cold temperatures feel colder.
items.example_en: The wind chill made it feel like minus ten degrees outside.

items.definition_en: Thermal inversion happens when warmer air sits above cooler air near the ground.
items.example_en: Smog increased in the city due to a thermal inversion.

items.definition_en: The dew point is the temperature at which air becomes saturated with moisture.
items.example_en: The dew point was high so it felt muggy all day.

items.definition_en: A heat dome is a weather event where a hot air mass gets trapped over an area.
items.example_en: The city experienced record temperatures during the heat dome.

items.definition_en: The frost line is the deepest point that ground freezes during winter.
items.example_en: Pipes must be installed below the frost line to prevent freezing.

items.definition_en: A summer high is the highest temperature reached in summer.
items.example_en: Yesterday saw the summer high break records.

items.definition_en: A winter low is the lowest temperature during the winter months.
items.example_en: The winter low last night was below freezing.

items.definition_en: Oven heat describes very intense, dry heat.
items.example_en: It felt like oven heat as soon as I stepped outside.

items.definition_en: Permafrost is ground that remains frozen for years.
items.example_en: Houses in the Arctic are built on permafrost.

items.definition_en: Relative humidity measures how much water vapor is in the air compared to the maximum possible.
items.example_en: The relative humidity was at 80%, making it feel much warmer.

items.definition_en: Thermal comfort is the condition of feeling satisfied with the surrounding temperature.
items.example_en: Proper insulation improves thermal comfort at home.

items.definition_en: Ground frost is a thin layer of ice that forms on the ground overnight.
items.example_en: The grass was white from ground frost this morning.

items.definition_en: Radiant heat is heat that is felt directly from the sun or other sources.
items.example_en: You can feel radiant heat through the window even in winter.

items.definition_en: A tropical night is an event when the temperature stays above 20°C all night.
items.example_en: We had a tropical night yesterday and barely slept.

items.definition_en: A cold spell is a period of low temperatures lasting several days.
items.example_en: A cold spell in April surprised everyone.

items.definition_en: Boiling point is the temperature at which a liquid turns to gas.
items.example_en: Water reaches its boiling point at 100 degrees Celsius.

items.definition_en: An ice day is when the temperature stays below freezing all day.
items.example_en: School was canceled due to the first ice day of the year.

items.definition_en: An arctic blast is a sudden arrival of very cold air from the Arctic.
items.example_en: The city braced for an arctic blast this weekend.
